'''favuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:noasaurid|noasaurid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-v-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:noasaurid|noasaurid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| favuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fævihith|fævihith]] || [[word:fævihij|fævihij]] || [[word:fævihish|fævihish]] || [[word:fævihi|fævihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:favuvuhuth|favuvuhuth]] || [[word:favuvuhuj|favuvuhuj]] || [[word:favuvuhush|favuvuhush]] || [[word:favuvuhu|favuvuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:favuhuth|favuhuth]] || [[word:favuhuj|favuhuj]] || [[word:favuhush|favuhush]] || [[word:favuhu|favuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:favufhuth|favufhuth]] || [[word:favufhuj|favufhuj]] || [[word:favufhush|favufhush]] || [[word:favufhuf|favufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:favuhuthu|favuhuthu]] || [[word:favuhuju|favuhuju]] || [[word:favuhushu|favuhushu]] || [[word:favuhuku|favuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:favuhuth|favuhuth]] || [[word:favuhuj|favuhuj]] || [[word:favuhush|favuhush]] || [[word:favuhu|favuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:favuhuthul|favuhuthul]] || [[word:favuhujul|favuhujul]] || [[word:favuhushul|favuhushul]] || [[word:favuhukul|favuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:favuhuthuthu|favuhuthuthu]] || [[word:favuhujuju|favuhujuju]] || [[word:favuhushushu|favuhushushu]] || [[word:favuhuku|favuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:favuhuthun|favuhuthun]] || [[word:favuhujun|favuhujun]] || [[word:favuhushun|favuhushun]] || [[word:favuhukun|favuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:favuhuthuoro|favuhuthuoro]] || [[word:favuhujuoro|favuhujuoro]] || [[word:favuhushuoro|favuhushuoro]] || [[word:favuhukuoro|favuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
